word: G3447 - μοσχοποιέω - moschopoiéō - mos-khop-oy-eh'-o - Make a calf

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μοσχοποιέω

- Transliteration: Moschopoieo

- Phonetic: mos-khop-oy-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to make (an image of) a calf

- Origin: from G3448 and G4160

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3448 and G4160; to fabricate the image of a bullock: - make a calf.
